programs.pageSubtitle: Specialized Vocational Training for Your Future
programs.renewableEnergyDesc: Master the principles of renewable energy systems including solar, wind, and hydroelectric power generation. Learn installation, maintenance, and optimization of renewable energy solutions.
programs.electricityDesc: Comprehensive training in electrical systems and power distribution. Develop expertise in circuit design, troubleshooting, and safe electrical installations.
programs.digitalMarketingDesc: Learn to build and execute effective digital marketing strategies across multiple platforms. Master SEO, social media, content creation, and data analytics.
programs.generalComputingDesc: Develop foundational IT skills covering operating systems, networking, databases, and system administration. Prepare for a career in technology.
programs.graphicDesignDesc: Create stunning visual content using industry-standard design tools. Learn UI/UX principles, branding, and visual communication strategies.
programs.surveillanceTitle: Surveillance Camera Installation and Automobile Tracking
programs.surveillanceDesc: Specialized training in security systems installation and monitoring. Learn CCTV setup, GPS tracking technology, and modern surveillance solutions.
programs.webDesignDesc: Build beautiful and responsive websites from scratch. Master HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern web design principles for professional web development.
programs.bilingualTrainingDesc: Develop fluency in French and English with a focus on business communication. Enhance your language skills for better career opportunities.

home.tagline: Empowering the next gen in Engineering! 💡 Hands-on training for high-paying careers in tech, electrical & solar. Join us!

history.heroSubtitle: A legacy of excellence in vocational training — empowering generations with practical skills for a changing world.
history.introText: New World Technology Vocational Training Institute has built a proud tradition of excellence since its founding. We have continuously evolved to meet the demands of industry, producing skilled graduates who drive innovation and development across Cameroon and beyond.
history.legacyTitle: Building the Future, One Graduate at a Time
history.legacyText: From our first cohort of students to our growing alumni network, every milestone reflects our unwavering commitment to practical, industry-ready education that transforms lives and communities.

milestones.title: Institute Founded
milestones.description: New World Technology Vocational Training Institute was established in Yaoundé, Cameroon, with a mission to provide practical, high-quality vocational education to the next generation.

milestones.title: First Graduates
milestones.description: The institute celebrated its first graduating cohort, with students entering the workforce in electrical engineering, computing, and renewable energy sectors.

milestones.title: Renewable Energy Program Launched
milestones.description: In response to growing demand for green energy professionals, NWTVT launched its flagship Renewable Energy program, covering solar, wind, and energy management.

milestones.title: Digital Technology Expansion
milestones.description: New programs in General Computing, Graphic Design, and Web Design were introduced, positioning the institute as a leading centre for digital skills training.

milestones.title: CCTV & GPS Surveillance Program
milestones.description: A specialized program in surveillance camera installation and automobile tracking was launched, addressing the fast-growing security technology sector.

milestones.title: Bilingual Training Initiative
milestones.description: The Bilingual Training program was introduced to equip students with professional French and English communication skills, broadening career opportunities across Central Africa.

milestones.title: Industry Partnerships
milestones.description: NWTVT formalized partnerships with leading technology and energy companies, enabling students to access real-world apprenticeships and internship placements.

milestones.title: Digital Marketing Program
milestones.description: Responding to the digital economy, the institute launched a comprehensive Digital Marketing program covering SEO, social media strategy, content creation, and data analytics.

programDetail.whyChooseDesc: This program is designed to equip you with practical, industry-ready skills. Our experienced instructors provide hands-on training that prepares you for real-world challenges and career advancement.
programDetail.curriculumDesc: Learn industry-relevant skills with our carefully designed curriculum.
programDetail.instructorsDesc: Learn from experienced professionals with real-world expertise.
programDetail.careerDesc: Get guidance and support in launching your career after graduation.

footer.aboutCompany: Empowering the next generation with cutting-edge vocational training in renewable energy, technology, and professional development.
footer.copyright: New World Technology Vocational Training Institute. All rights reserved.

admissions.heroSubtitle: Your journey to a professional career begins here. Applications are now open for the new academic year.
admissions.programsSub: All programs below are currently accepting applications for the 2025–2026 academic year. Spots are limited — apply early.
admissions.requirementsSub: We welcome motivated individuals who meet the following minimum criteria.

requirements.title: Academic Qualification
requirements.desc: Minimum GCE Ordinary Level (5 subjects including English) or Baccalauréat (Série A, C, D, or F). Equivalent qualifications are assessed individually.

requirements.title: Age Requirement
requirements.desc: Applicants must be at least 17 years old at the time of enrollment. There is no upper age limit — we welcome working professionals seeking to upskill.

requirements.title: Prior Experience
requirements.desc: No prior professional experience is required for standard admission. However, work experience is an advantage for advanced program tracks and will be noted at interview.

requirements.title: Entrance Assessment
requirements.desc: All applicants sit a short written test covering logical reasoning and basic mathematics. Shortlisted candidates proceed to a 15-minute personal interview with an admissions panel.

admissions.documentsSub: Please come prepared with all documents below to avoid delays. Originals are required for verification — they will be returned to you the same day.
admissions.documentsNotice: All photocopies must be certified true copies by a competent authority (school, notary, or divisional officer). Uncertified copies will not be accepted.
admissions.feesSub: We believe quality education should be accessible. Payment plans are available for all students.
admissions.registrationFeeDesc: Non-refundable. Paid on the day of application submission. Covers administrative processing and entrance assessment.
admissions.tuitionFeeDesc: Varies by program. Payable in up to 3 installments per semester. First installment due before class start date.
admissions.stepsTitle: How to Apply — Step by Step
admissions.stepsSub: Follow these six steps to complete your application successfully.

steps.title: Obtain Application Form
steps.desc: Visit our admissions office or download the form online. Complete all sections clearly in block letters.

steps.title: Gather Required Documents
steps.desc: Prepare certified copies of all required documents. Ensure originals are ready for verification.

steps.title: Submit Application & Pay Fee
steps.desc: Submit your completed form with documents and pay the 5,000 FCFA non-refundable registration fee.

steps.title: Entrance Assessment
steps.desc: Attend a short written test and a brief interview with the admissions panel (no prior preparation needed).

steps.title: Receive Admission Letter
steps.desc: Successful candidates receive their official admission letter within 5 working days by email and SMS.

steps.title: Pay Tuition & Enroll
steps.desc: Confirm your place by paying the first tuition installment and completing your enrollment registration.

admissions.accredSub: When you graduate from our institution, your certificate opens real doors.

accredCards.title: Government Recognized
accredCards.desc: All diplomas are officially recognized by the by the State which is under the Ministry Of Proffessional Training and Employment (MINPTE) of Cameroon. Your qualification is valid nationwide and internationally.

accredCards.title: Mandatory Internship
accredCards.desc: Every program includes a structured internship in the final year. We partner with over 6 companies and organizations to guarantee quality placement opportunities.

accredCards.title: Job Placement Support
accredCards.desc: Our careers office actively connects graduates with employers. We host annual recruitment fairs and maintain a job board exclusively for our alumni network.

testimonials.name: Kum Louis
testimonials.text: The teachers teach in a way that makes learning easy and accessible even for students who do not come from a technical background.

testimonials.name: Cheng Cheng cyrue
testimonials.text: I had all my documents ready thanks to the checklist they gave me. The entrance test was straightforward and fair.

testimonials.name: Ateh niofr kerry
testimonials.text: The installment payment plan made it very manageable for my family. I never felt financially pressured during enrollment.

faqs.q: Is admission open all year round?
faqs.a: Admission is primarily open from June to August for the September intake. However, late applications may be considered on a case-by-case basis until October, subject to available spots.

faqs.q: Do I need an appointment before coming to campus?
faqs.a: An appointment is not strictly required, but it is recommended to ensure an admissions officer is available to attend to you. You can call or WhatsApp us to schedule a convenient time.

faqs.q: Is prior work experience required for admission?
faqs.a: Prior experience is not required for most programs. However, for certain advanced professional tracks, relevant work experience may be an added advantage during the interview.

faqs.q: Can I pay tuition in installments?
faqs.a: Yes. Tuition can be paid in up to three installments per semester. The first installment must be paid before classes begin. A payment schedule is agreed upon at enrollment.

faqs.q: Is the certificate recognized by the Cameroonian government?
faqs.a: Yes. All our certificates and diplomas are recognized by the Ministry Of Proffessional Training and Employment (MINPTE). We are a fully accredited institution.

faqs.q: Is internship included in the programs?
faqs.a: Yes. All programs include a mandatory internship component in the final year. Our partnerships with local companies and NGOs ensure students access quality internship placements.

admissions.findUsSub: Our admissions office is open Monday to Friday. Walk-ins welcome, appointments preferred.
admissions.ctaTitle: Ready to Take the Next Step?
admissions.ctaText: Don't wait — spots fill up fast. Apply today and secure your place in Cameroon's leading professional training institute.

missionVision.heroSubtitle: The principles and ambitions that guide every decision we make and every student we train.
missionVision.missionText: Our mission is to equip students with the technical expertise and real-world practical knowledge required to excel in the fields of computer technology, electrical wiring, renewable energy solutions such as solar power, and CCTV installation. We are committed to: delivering high-quality, industry-relevant training that blends theory with hands-on practice; inspiring creativity, problem-solving, and fresh ideas among youth; building a skilled workforce capable of addressing current and future engineering challenges; providing accessible, inclusive, and future-driven education that prepares learners for meaningful employment and entrepreneurship; empowering students to contribute to a better today and a brighter tomorrow through sustainable and innovative engineering solutions.
missionVision.visionText: To become a leading vocational training center that empowers youth with practical skills, innovative thinking, and hands-on experience in modern engineering fields — preparing them to create sustainable solutions and grow confidently in today's competitive job market.
missionVision.valuesSub: These six values are the foundation of everything we do — from how we teach to how we support our students.

coreValues.title: Innovation
coreValues.desc: We continuously update our curriculum and teaching methods to reflect the latest industry trends and technological advancements.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.desc: We uphold the highest standards of honesty, transparency, and ethical conduct in all our academic and administrative activities.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.desc: We are deeply invested in the growth of our local communities, training graduates who give back and drive positive change.

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.desc: We pursue excellence in everything — from the quality of instruction to the learning environment and student support services.

coreValues.title: Accreditation
coreValues.desc: All our programs meet the national standards set by the Ministry of Higher Education (MINESUP), ensuring your qualification is recognized.

coreValues.title: Inclusivity
coreValues.desc: We believe education is a right. We strive to make our programs accessible to students from all backgrounds and walks of life.

missionVision.objectivesSub: These are the concrete goals that drive our institution forward each academic year.

objectives.title: Deliver Industry-Ready Training
objectives.desc: Ensure every graduate possesses hands-on skills that are immediately applicable in the workplace, reducing the skills gap in key sectors.

objectives.title: Expand Program Offerings
objectives.desc: Continuously develop new vocational programs that respond to emerging market demands, including green energy, digital technology, and bilingual communication.

objectives.title: Strengthen Industry Partnerships
objectives.desc: Build and deepen relationships with local companies, NGOs, and government agencies to create robust internship and employment pipelines for our students.

objectives.title: Achieve Full Institutional Accreditation
objectives.desc: Maintain and expand our accreditation status with MINESUP, ensuring all programs meet or exceed national education quality benchmarks.

objectives.title: Promote Digital Transformation
objectives.desc: Integrate digital tools, e-learning resources, and modern lab equipment into all training programs to prepare students for the digital economy.

objectives.title: Support Graduate Employment
objectives.desc: Operate an active careers service that tracks graduate outcomes, facilitates employer connections, and provides post-graduation support.

missionVision.bannerText: Our mission and vision are not just words on a wall — they are lived every day in our classrooms, workshops, and in the careers of thousands of graduates across Cameroon and beyond.

leadership.heroSubtitle: Guided by experienced professionals dedicated to transforming lives through quality vocational education.
leadership.quote: True leadership is about empowering others to discover their potential and giving them the tools to build their future. Every student who walks through our doors leaves with more than a certificate — they leave with purpose.
leadership.executiveSub: A team of dedicated educators and professionals committed to delivering excellence in vocational training.

leaders.name: Mr. Fuh Rene Che
leaders.bio: Mr. Fuh Rene Che, Founder and CEO of New World Technology Vocational Training Institute in Yaoundé, is a seasoned engineering professional and a leading voice in practical technology education in Cameroon. An expert in solar energy systems, surveillance camera technology, and industrial electrical wiring, he has built a distinguished career rooted in innovation, technical mastery, and a passion for youth empowerment. Mr. Che served for five years at ICT University, where he contributed as Chief Electrical Engineer and Lecturer in the Renewable Energy Department. During his tenure, he worked under the leadership of respected academics such as Prof. Jeah Emmanuel Pondi, Rev. Prof. Anyambod Emmanuel Anya, and Prof. Pierre Fonkoua, further solidifying his commitment to academic excellence and technical advancement. With a bold vision to transform the future of engineering education, Mr. Fuh Rene Che leads with purpose, integrity, and an unwavering belief that practical skills and innovation are the key drivers of tomorrow's opportunities. Through his leadership, the institute continues to shape a new generation of skilled, confident, and industry-ready professionals prepared to meet the demands of an evolving world.

leadership.boardSub: Industry leaders and education specialists who guide our strategic direction and industry alignment.
leadership.bannerText: Our leadership team brings together decades of combined experience in education, engineering, and business — all united by a single commitment: your success.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.description: We use cookies to enhance your experience, analyze site traffic, and serve personalized content. By continuing to use this site, you agree to our use of cookies.
cookies.learnMore: Learn more about our cookie policy
